selected_goal: Filter mark_scheme_text foreign labels against known question numbers for the same paper.
why_this_now: The live audit from iteration 3 found an apparent false positive, 90 (x), which is shaped like a label but not a question number in that paper.
repo_evidence: The question bank has paper and question_number fields for every record, so known question numbers can constrain the text-label check.
tests/test_audit.py now owns the text-label regression.
acceptance_criteria: A label-like line such as 90 (x) is ignored when 90 is not a known question number for the paper.
Known foreign labels such as q7/q9 inside q10 text are still reported.
The live audit foreign-label count drops or examples no longer include 90 (x).
test_expectations: Extend the audit test with known q7/q9 records for q10's paper and an unknown 90 (x) line that must not be reported.
implementation_boundaries: Do not suppress foreign labels when the target paper's question numbers are known.
Do not use fuzzy numeric parsing beyond top-level labels.
rollback_plan: Remove the known-question-number filter and adjusted test fixture.
done_when: Targeted tests pass and live audit examples no longer include the 90-label false positive.
